one_line_ask: Turn one batch of raw vertical clips plus a hero still, brand logo, and a voiceover scratch track into a post-ready 9:16 phonk-energy short: an AI sizzle cut reframed to 1080x1920, a cleaned VO track, an on-screen caption sheet, and a fully color-graded exported thumbnail with a vector logo lockup.
brief: I run a fast-growing Instagram + TikTok presence and need a short-form edit shipped post-ready for both platforms. For this assignment I'm sending: (a) three raw vertical clips from a night drive / street shoot, (b) one hero still grabbed from the footage to become the cover/thumbnail, (c) my brand wordmark logo as a flat PNG, (d) a rough voiceover scratch take with room noise that needs cleaning, and (e) a captions script as data. The concept is phonk-style energy but with a professional, polished finish — clean, current, on-brand color (cool teal shadows, magenta highlight bite). Deliverables: 1x final ~30s 9:16 MP4 ready to post on Instagram and TikTok (HD/Full HD); a matching on-screen captions/text asset; a cleaned voiceover track; and an exported, fully color-graded 1080x1920 thumbnail frame with my logo locked up in the corner as a crisp vector so it scales. Source assets stay in my Creative Cloud folder so tweaks are easy. Turnaround 24-48h, lean budget — efficient workflow over flashy effects. NOTE up front: frame-accurate timeline cuts, animated motion graphics, hard transitions, and beat-synced music are a manual Premiere finish and are out of scope for the automated con
